title: Take Me to Church
why_this_song: Take Me to Church by Hozier (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "The only Heaven I'll be sent to"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "My church offers no absolutes"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "She tells me, "Worship in the bedroom""
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Good God, let me give you my life"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "A, Amen, Amen, Amen"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies
I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife
Good God, let me give you my life

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "church" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "church" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: She's the giggle at a funeral
Good God, let me give you my life

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Take Me to Church" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Take Me to Church"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Hozier one question about "Take Me to Church", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Hozier sobre "Take Me to Church", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Take Me to Church" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Take Me to Church" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
